creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
List of ports that require the PHP mysql extension which was dropped from 7.0.

> =======================<phase: check-sanity   >============================
> Unknown extension mysql for PHP 71.
> *** Error code 1

These ports should get added

> IGNORE_WITH_PHP= 70 71 72
> DEPRECATED= port requires mysql which was dropped from PHP 7.0
> EXPIRATION_DATE= 2018-12-31
